source_documents: D2_正式对象契约与字段字典.md
D3_正式规则码总表与判定说明书.md
D13_公开可查边界能力清单.md
D6_字段策略字典与客户交付字段规范.md
D7_对象级交付矩阵与外发治理规范.md
D11_测试验收与金标回归清单.md
notes: This is the first machine-readable core package for pre-code readiness.
The package freezes minimum stable contracts and is intended to be extended in later rounds rather than replaced.
Any implementation must consume these catalogs without creating a second vocabulary.
consumer surfaces and release layer aligned with D13
quantized decision policies appended for window/value/price/competitor/sku
stage 8 execution policies appended for contact priority/cadence/retry/stop/writeback
stage 9 exception and outcome taxonomy rules appended
stage 9 internal governed rule group finalized for lifecycle, writeback and release blocking
metadata.scope: formal rule directory with result, evidence and boundary constraints

rules.name: 多版本或多时钟冲突未解
公示窗口已失效或动作窗口不成立
关键字段前后版本冲突
全国公开信用链限制命中
候选集合攻击面正式成立
项目经理注册信息公开冲突线索
项目经理在建冲突公开线索
公开主体关系冲突线索
施工许可或竣工备案公开异常线索
合同订立或履约增强字段异常线索
公开附件内容异常线索
关键人员配置一致性公开线索
履约异常或合同变更观察
主证仅为截图/OCR/模型摘要阻断
来源家族与平台层级不匹配
notes: REVIEW_REQUEST maps to collection_state REVIEW_REQUIRED for stage 1-2

rules.name: coverage 不足降级或复核
notes: Coverage tier below threshold triggers downgrade or review.

rules.name: robots 或法律限制阻断
notes: BLOCK maps to collection_state BLOCKED for stage 1-2.

rules.name: 附件缺失或 OCR 退化
notes: Manual supplementation may restore the chain after review.

rules.name: 版本链或时钟链冲突未解
notes: Unresolved conflicts require review; severe cases may block.

rules.name: 销售线索前置条件缺失
notes: lead_status moves to REVIEW when prerequisites are missing.

rules.name: 可售机会阻断与降级
notes: saleability_status moves to BLOCKED or RESTRICTED when gate/coverage/delivery blocks.

rules.name: 推荐方案前置条件不满足
notes: offer_recommendation_state moves to REVIEW_REQUIRED when prerequisites missing.

rules.name: 触达合规阻断
notes: contact_target_status moves to BLOCKED when compliance fails.

rules.name: 触达计划审批与运行模式约束
notes: plan_status remains REVIEW_REQUIRED until approval is complete.

rules.name: 触达记录写入阻断
notes: touch_record_state may only advance when plan is approved.

rules.name: 触达合规待审
notes: requires_manual_review must be true for restricted channel families or unresolved basis.

rules.name: 字段归一冲突进入复核
字段冲突裁决完成/归一通过
证据链不完整进入 REVIEW
规则命中进入门禁评估
规则命中被新版本替代
复核队列优先级重分桶
订单承接与商业状态门禁
notes: commercial_status may only advance to CONFIRMED after approval and audit.

rules.name: 订单终止与回写
notes: order termination must trigger outcome writeback.

rules.name: 付款方不匹配阻断
notes: delivery must not proceed when payer mismatch is confirmed.

rules.name: 部分付款与金额不符处理
交付放行门禁
notes: delivery_status may only advance to DELIVERED when release gates pass.

rules.name: 部分交付与补发回写
notes: partial delivery must not close delivery_record.

rules.name: 归档失败与调阅失败阻断
负结果回写强制
notes: negative outcomes must be written back to stage 6/7/8.

rules.name: 结果 taxonomy 校验与回写
治理反馈触发与写回
notes: governance feedback required for blocked delivery or policy violation.

rules.name: 治理反馈 taxonomy 校验
主联系人选择与优先级裁决
多联系人冲突转人工
notes: conflict resolution requires manual review before execution.

rules.name: 触达失败回写与下一步
notes: failure writeback taxonomy for stage 8 outcomes.

rules.name: 项目/线索/商机价值评分与分层
notes: internal scoring only; no external promise

rules.name: 竞争者证据累积与置信度
